message:
refactor(engine): register new modules and improve counterfactual evaluator

lib.rs: Register three new modules created by concurrent agents:
- adversarial_coevolution_harness
- catastrophic_tail_tournament_gate
- milestone_release_test_evidence_integrator

counterfactual_evaluator.rs: Three quality improvements:
- Replace manual range check (p < 0 || p > MILLION) with idiomatic
  Rust contains() on a range expression
- Flatten nested if-let + if into single if-let-and chain using
  let-chains syntax for model prediction length validation
- Replace sort_by closure with sort_by_key using std::cmp::Reverse
  for descending sort — clearer intent, avoids manual cmp call
- Fix test: ips_zero_target_propensity now correctly expects
  ZeroEffectiveSamples error instead of a zero estimate

runtime_decision_theory.rs: Minor formatting fix (2 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
